"D:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DSCODEC__.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\DSCODEC__.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DSCODEC__.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DSCODEC__.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DSCODEC__.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDSCODEC__.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DSCODEC__.dir\linkLibs.rsp
